conversation.user: I need to read chapters 5-9 of my political theory textbook for next week's discussion. About 150 pages. I need to be able to discuss the arguments, not just summarize. 45 min a day.

expectedAI.reason: 토론 날짜를 알아야 총 가용일 계산 → dailyTarget 결정 가능
mustDiagnose: discussion-focused reading → argument-mapping needed, not cover-to-cover
mustNotDo: plan 바로 생성 (토론 날짜 모름 → 일수 불확정)

conversation.user: The discussion is next Wednesday. So I have 7 days including today.

expectedAI.strategy: reverse reading: read discussion questions first, then relevant sections; 2-pass skim: 1.5min/p full structure pass, then deep-read top 30-40p
expectedAI.honestAssessment: 3.1× budget deficit — full cover-to-cover reading is impossible. Selective deep reading is the only viable strategy.

alternatives.label: 핵심 논증 30-40p 집중
alternatives.change: 150p → 30-40p (토론 질문 직접 관련 페이지만 argument mapping)

alternatives.label: 교수 토론 질문 역추적
alternatives.change: 150p → 교수 질문 기반 30% 구간만 deep read, 나머지 skim

mustIdentify: discussion-focused reading needs argument analysis not summarization
diagnosis.mustReflectInPlan: triage strategy — selective deep reading over full coverage

emotion.toneExpected: neutral to mildly supportive; practical triage framing
